activities_projects.title: Identify Manufactured Products
steps: List 10 products used daily such as paper, sugar, clothes, etc.
Write the raw material used for each product
Identify the industry that manufactures them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the concept of manufacturing and finished goods
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of products and industries (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Classification of Industries
activities_projects.objective: Learn different ways industries are classified
steps: Write examples of industries around you
Classify them as agro-based or mineral-based
Further classify them as public, private or cooperative

activities_projects.title: Cotton Textile Industry Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of the cotton textile industry
steps: List major cotton textile centres in India
Mark them on the map of India
Write reasons for their location
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands location factors of textile industries

activities_projects.title: Jute Industry Research
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the jute textile industry
steps: Find where most jute mills are located in India
Write reasons for concentration near the Hugli River
List products made from jute
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands regional concentration of jute industry

activities_projects.title: Iron and Steel Industry Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Understand the process of steel manufacturing
steps: Draw a flowchart showing the process of steel manufacturing
Label raw materials like iron ore, coal and limestone
Explain why iron and steel is called a basic industry
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the importance of iron and steel industry
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of diagram and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Locate Steel Plants in India
steps: Find Bhilai, Bokaro, Durgapur and Rourkela on the map
Mark them on an outline map of India
Write one feature of each plant

activities_projects.title: Chemical Industry Products
steps: List products made by chemical industries
Classify them as inorganic or organic chemicals
Write their uses in daily life

activities_projects.title: Industrial Pollution Observation
steps: List the four types of industrial pollution
Write sources of each type
Suggest two methods to reduce pollution

activities_projects.title: Industry Around Us
activities_projects.objective: Connect textbook learning with real life
steps: Identify one industry in your locality
Write the raw materials it uses
Describe the products it produces
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Relates local industries with textbook concepts

activities_projects.title: Industrial Pollution Awareness Poster
steps: Create a poster showing effects of industrial pollution
Include ways to control pollution
Display the poster in the classroom
